title: Ubiquiti UA-Reader Lite (UA-Lite) - UniFi Access Reader Lite
category: Ubiquiti UA-Reader Lite (UA-Lite) - UniFi Access Reader Lite
description: The UniFi Access Reader Lite has been designed for convenient use and secure access. The PoE powered reader is easy to install and supports the latest NFC security standards including AES-128 encrypted MIFARE DESFire. Unlocking the door is quick and secure with NFC card or with mobile app NFC Tag 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 MIFARE Classic MIFARE Plus MIFARE Ultralight MIFARE DESFire EV1/EV2 Elegantly designed NFC and Bluetooth reader 802.3af PoE powered by UniFi Access Hub Advanced NFC credentials, including MIFARE DESFire Mobile access with app (future software release) Device (UA-Lite) Wall mount Torx screwdriver, screws
